title: Create_recipes
description: Hi! This is my first mod, its a bit simple. So its add a recipe of a laminary with create mixer, in future i will add a more nice recipes for create a easy automatic farms!
body: This is my first ever i made mod! Its pretty simple, but in future i will do a more of recipes. The one recipe the mod add its recipe of kelp. Recommended to download JEI mod for better use. The mod need to have create on your client. Mod works on server and solo game.
